results.title: Johor BN rules out coalition government if it retains power, says Onn Hafiz
results.description: JOHOR BARU: Johor Barisan Nasional will not form a coalition government with any other political party if it retains power after the state election, says its chairman, Datuk Onn Hafiz Ghazi.

results.title: Letter: Downtown development has been a failure
results.description: It’s hard to get excited about downtown Buffalo. Doug Jemal has for sale or lease signs on many of his properties. The AM&A’s building continues to rot away.

results.title: Letter: Cutting USAID enabled screwworm spread
results.description: When we gut international assistance, Americans suffer. I don’t want my dog to die because our government allowed parasites to spread out of control.

results.title: Iran says deal to end Mideast war 'declaration of US defeat'
results.description: The war that began with a massive US-Israeli campaign of strikes against Iran on February 28 ended with the Islamic Republic striking an agreement its leaders have sought to portray as a victory.

results.title: Jim Dey | Foes of assisted-suicide law seek to give it an early burial
results.description: In December, Gov. J.B. Pritzker signed a groundbreaking law that authorized physician-assisted suicide for individuals who are terminally ill.
